message: 현재 서버 상태와 디스크 용량 확인해줘
Bash: `df -h && echo "---" && free -h && echo "---" && docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}" 2>/dev/nu`

tool_input.command: df -h && echo "---" && free -h && echo "---" && docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}" 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && uptime
tool_input.description: Check disk, memory, docker status, uptime

message: Bash: `docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}" 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; uptime; echo "---"; cat /proc/me`

tool_input.command: docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}" 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; uptime; echo "---"; cat /proc/meminfo | grep -E "MemTotal|MemFree|MemAvailable" 2>/dev/null
